AWAKENED-ABYSS_BLADE.title: Abyss Blade
AWAKENED-ABYSS_BLADE.description: The first time you are Drained each turn, gain @AwE and draw a card.
AWAKENED-BIRD_FACED_VASE.title: Bird-Faced Vase
AWAKENED-BIRD_FACED_VASE.description: The first 4 times you play a {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Power|Power}} card each combat, heal 3 HP.
AWAKENED-BIRD_FACED_VASE.flavor: This urn shows the crow god Mazaleth looking mischievous.
AWAKENED-CRESCENT_TALISMAN.title: Crescent Talisman
AWAKENED-CRESCENT_TALISMAN.description: Upon pickup, choose a card that does NOT have Conjure, and add Conjure to it.
AWAKENED-CRESCENT_TALISMAN.flavor: “Please, just... don't forget me. Even after I die.”
AWAKENED-DESSICATED_HAND.title: Dessicated Hand
AWAKENED-EYE_OF_THE_OCCULT.title: Eye of the Occult
AWAKENED-EYE_OF_THE_OCCULT.flavor: This gruesome carving imparts magical knowledge to its owner.
AWAKENED-FINAL_RITES.title: Final Rites
AWAKENED-FINAL_RITES.description: The first time you activate 3 Chant effects in a combat, gain 1 Ritual.
AWAKENED-FINAL_RITES.flavor: I leave everything I own to my cat, Noodles. Goodbye, cruel world. XOXO Jouster
AWAKENED-MANABOMB.title: Manabomb
AWAKENED-MANABOMB.description: Whenever an enemy dies, transfer any Manaburn it has to a random enemy.
AWAKENED-PAPER_CROW.title: Paper Crow
AWAKENED-PAPER_CROW.flavor: Arbiter of doubt and curses folded one thousand times...
AWAKENED-RIPPED_DOLL.title: Ripped Doll
AWAKENED-RIPPED_DOLL.description: At the start of the first 2 turns of combat, [blue]Conjure[/blue].
AWAKENED-RIPPED_DOLL.flavor: The last reminder of your prior self. It still holds latent magicks.
AWAKENED-SHREDDED_DOLL.title: Shredded Doll
AWAKENED-SHREDDED_DOLL.description:
A the start of your turn, [blue]Conjure[/blue].
The first time you refresh your Spells each combat, gain 1 [blue]Ritual[/blue].
AWAKENED-SHREDDED_DOLL.flavor: A reminder of your weakness, and yet you still can't let go.
AWAKENED-TOME_OF_PORTALMANCY.title: Tome of Portalmancy
AWAKENED-WHITE_RIBBON.title: White Ribbon
AWAKENED-WHITE_RIBBON.description: Whenever you play a card with a Chant effect, gain 3 Block, even if it is not active.
AWAKENED-WHITE_RIBBON.flavor: Gives power to spoken words even without proper ritual.
AWAKENED-ZENER_DECK.title: Zener Deck
AWAKENED-ZENER_DECK.description: At the start of combat, add {{C|ESP}} to your Spellbook and Conjure it.
AWAKENED-ZENER_DECK.flavor: “One, two, three, all eyes should be on me.”
AWAKENED-ZETSUMEI.title: Zetsumei
AWAKENED-ZETSUMEI.description: Every time you play 4 Spells in a combat, gain a {{C|Ceremony}}.
AWAKENED-ZETSUMEI.flavor: A blade favored by mages due to its ability to channel casted magic back into itself.
